title: Default case statement assertions skips prior case states

features.name: case item with empty begin end block
features.description: Code should include a case statement with a case item that contains only an empty begin/end block with no statements
features.snippet:
case(x)
2'b0: begin end
default: assert(0);
endcase

features.name: assert in default case of combinational always block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with a case statement where the default case contains an assert statement
features.snippet:
always @(*)
case(o_value)
4'h0: begin end
default: assert(0);
endcase
